skill.summary: Scan DeFi protocols for the best yield opportunities. Covers Aave, Compound, Curve, Yearn, Uniswap v3, and emerging L2 protocols. Compares APY vs risk, track...

latestVersion.changelog:
Initial release – powerful scanner for DeFi yield opportunities.

- Supports Aave, Compound, Curve, Yearn, Uniswap v3, and new L2 protocols.
- Ranks opportunities by APY, risk, sustainability, and gas efficiency.
- Tracks TVL changes, new farm launches, and stablecoin optimizations.
- Pulls live data from DeFiLlama, Aave, Curve, and Yearn APIs.
- Returns easy-to-read yield rankings with direct entry instructions.
